pages.text:
BUYING GUIDE
HEMNES
Bedroom series


DESIGN
Carina Bengs.

CARE & CLEANING
Wipe clean with a cloth damped
in a mild cleaner. Wipe dry with
a clean cloth.

WARNING!
TIPPING HAZARD
Unanchored furniture can tip
over. Some of these furniture
shall be anchored to the wall
with the enclosed safety fitting
to prevent it from tipping over.


                          Tradition meets function
                      Want a country-style bedroom? Take a look at the HEMNES se­
                                 ries, which has all the furniture you need. Robust with traditional
                               details and a real sense of craftsmanship, but with all those prac­
                                   tical functions you need in a modern bedroom. All furniture comes
                                in solid white and black-brown, or white stain - and some pieces
                                in bright colours. There are lots of options to mix and match, so
                             that you can furnish with your own personal style.


All the products (shown here) may not be available at the store. Please contact the staff
or look at  for more information. For more detailed product information,
see the pricetag and the Internet.

WALL ANCHORING GUIDE
If your wall material is not listed or if you have questions, consult with a local hardware retailer.


We all want our homes to be a safe place. But in our        • Secure it! Use the tip-over restraint provided with the
homes, accidents can put children at risk. Working           product and the right hardware for your wall type.
together, we can help prevent these accidents and            Consult the enclosed guide for help with hardware.
make the home a safer place.                               • Never put a TV or other heavy objects on top of a chest
                                                                        of drawers or any furniture not intended for use with a
                                                                TV.
                                                              • Place heavy objects in the lowest drawers.
                                                              • Never let children climb or hang on drawers, doors or
                                                                    shelves.


                 Wall Material: Drywall or plaster with                       Wall Material: Masonry.
                     available wood stud.

                Anchoring device: Screw inserted                        Anchoring device solid wall: plug
                      directly into stud. For example, a 5 mm                          with screw. For example, an 8 mm
               wood screw provided with IKEA FIXA                            plug provided with IKEA FIXA plug and
                   plug and screw set.                                         screw set.


                 Wall Material: Drywall or plaster with­                     Anchoring device hollow wall:
                   out available wood stud.                                           Toggle-style.

                Anchoring device: Plug with screw.
                   For example, an 8 mm plug provided
                   with IKEA FIXA plug and screw set.

ALL PARTS


               HEMNES bed frame. includes SKORVA mid­                            HEMNES dressing table with mirror,
                 beam and LURÖY slatted bed base.                                       W100×D50×H159 cm.*
                  Standard Single (W104×L201×H112 cm)                                        White                         303.744.13
                     Black-brown, pine             290.098.25
                    White stain, pine              090.098.26
                  Standard Double (W149×L201×H112 cm)                             HEMNES shoe cabinet,
                     Black-brown, pine              290.069.64                                W107×D22×H101 cm.
                    White stain, pine               990.069.65                                      White                         601.561.21
                  Standard King Size (W164×L211×H120 cm)
                     Black-brown, pine              790.069.66
                    White stain, pine               590.069.67
                                                                       HEMNES shoe cabinet, 2 comp.
                  Standard Super King-size
                                                                                 W89×D30×H127 cm.
                  (W194×L211×H120 cm)
                     Black-brown, pine              290.022.73                                      White                         201.695.59
                    White stain, pine               790.022.75


               HEMNES daybed, The day-bed must be                                  FLISBERGET door for PAX wardrobe.
                    completed with two mattresses, 80x200 cm.
                                                                        W50×H195 cm
                   They are placed on top of each other when
                                                                                                           Anthracite                     791.810.74                   you use the day-bed as a single bed, and next
                       to each other when you use it as a double bed                                          Light beige                    391.810.66
                   (L211×W87×H86 cm).                                          W50×H229 cm
                    White                        903.493.26                                          Anthracite                     291.810.76
                   Grey                          603.772.76
                                                                                                                Light beige                    991.810.68

                                                                                                        For more information regarding PAX frames
               HEMNES bedside table, W46×D35×H70 cm.                                  and interior organisers, see PAX buying
                                                                                                            guide.
                     Black-brown, pine              901.212.34
                    White stain, pine              202.004.56
                                                                       HEMNES hat and coat stand.

                                                                                                        Black                         002.468.70
               HEMNES chest of 2 drawers,
                 W54×D38×H66 cm.
                    White stain, pine               802.426.27
                   Grey stained, pine             003.924.61


               HEMNES chest of 3 drawers,
                W58×D40×H79 cm.
                     Black-brown, pine              204.847.42
                    White stain, pine               004.847.43


               HEMNES chest of 3 drawers,
                 W108×D50×H95 cm.*
                     Black-brown, pine              804.247.50
                    White stain, pine               804.247.45


               HEMNES chest of 6 drawers,
                 W108×D50×H130 cm.*
                     Black-brown, pine              602.392.68
                    White stain, pine               602.392.73
                   Grey stained, pine             803.924.62


               HEMNES chest of 8 drawers,
                 W160×D50×H95 cm.*
                     Black-brown, pine              402.392.74
                    White stain, pine               102.392.80
                   Grey stained, pine             303.924.69


               HEMNES glass top, transparent.

                  54×38 cm                    004.300.19
                  108×50 cm                   604.300.21
                  159×50 cm                   504.300.12


* This furniture shall be anchored to the wall with the enclosed safety fitting
  to prevent it from tipping over.

COMPLEMENTARY ITEMS


               SKUBB box, set of 6.


                    White                         004.285.49


                   Dark grey                     403.999.98
